name: Cheesy Chilanda Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Shredded Cheese (Monterey Jack or Cheddar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat with pepper, onion, and garlic; drain excess fat.
2. Add beans, tomato sauce, picante sauce, cumin, and salt to the meat mixture. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Spoon a small amount of meat mixture into a 13x9 baking dish.
4. Top with 6 tortillas.
5. Top with half of the remaining meat mixture; sprinkle with cheese.
6. Repeat steps 5-6, except do not add cheese on top.
7. Cover tightly with aluminum foil.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
9. Remove foil and top with remaining cheese.
10. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Top with lettuce, tomato, sour cream, and additional picante sauce.
